title: brucea guineensis
intro: Brucea guineensis is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the African oak tree. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating various infections, and improving immune function. The medicinal properties of Brucea guineensis are often utilized in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
